_comment: CloudMCP.run router wiring — a single HTTP MCP endpoint fans out to all backend servers. Auth is URL-based (your <user-id>.router.cloudmcp.run subdomain identifies you); no bearer token needed. Set CLOUDMCP_ROUTER_URL in your local .env (never committed). Equivalent CLI: `claude mcp add -t http cloudmcp-manager ${CLOUDMCP_ROUTER_URL}`.
